actionCalls.description: Calls an action to get the benefit verification step details when an error occurs while sending a request to the clearinghouse.
actionCalls.name: GetBenefitVerificationErrorDetails
actionCalls.label: Get Benefit Verification Error Details

actionCalls.description: Calls an action to retry the save benefit verification progress details.
actionCalls.name: RetrySaveBenefitVerification
actionCalls.label: Retry Save Benefit Verification

actionCalls.description: Calls an action to save the verification steps using the CompletedTextTemplate, flowOrchestratorInstanceRelatedObjectId, careBenefitVerifyRequestId, and stepNumber variables.
actionCalls.name: SaveBenefitVerificationProgressDetails
actionCalls.label: Save Benefit Verification Progress Details

actionCalls.description: Calls an action to save the verification steps using the InProgressTextTemplate, flowOrchestratorInstanceRelatedObjectId, careBenefitVerifyRequestId, and stepNumber variables.
actionCalls.name: SaveBenefitVerificationProgressDetailsForRetry
actionCalls.label: Save Benefit Verification Progress Details

actionCalls.description: Calls an action to save the verification steps using the InProgressTextTemplate, flowOrchestratorInstanceRelatedObjectId, careBenefitVerifyRequestId, and stepNumber variables.
actionCalls.name: SaveBenefitVerificationProgressDetailsForRetryTerminated
actionCalls.label: Save Benefit Verification Progress Details

actionCalls.description: Calls an action to save the benefit verification step details when the retry limit is exhausted.
actionCalls.name: SaveBenefitVerificationRetryLimitExhaustedErrorDetails
actionCalls.label: Save Benefit Verification Retry Limit Exhausted Error Details

actionCalls.description: Calls an action to send an asynchronous request to MuleSoft with a unique GUID from the guidForMulesoft variable and a care benefit verification request ID passed into the flow.
actionCalls.name: SendAsyncRequestToMuleSoft
actionCalls.label: Send Request to MuleSoft

assignments.description: Adds one to the value of the curRetryCount variable.
assignments.name: AddOneToCurrentRetryCount
assignments.label: Add One to Current Retry Count

assignments.description: Sets the guidForMule variable to a unique value made by combining the flow’s interview ID with the current retry attempt number.
assignments.name: SetGuidForMuleRequest
assignments.label: Set GUID for MuleSoft Request

assignments.description: Sets the isManualVerificationRequired variable to false.
assignments.name: SetManualVerificationonAckSuccess
assignments.label: Set Manual Verification on Ack Success

assignments.description: Sets the isManualVerificationRequired variable to false.
assignments.name: SetManualVerificationToFalse
assignments.label: Set Manual Verification to False

assignments.description: Sets the isManualVerificationRequired variable to true.
assignments.name: SetManualVerificationToTrueRetryLimitExceeded
assignments.label: Set Manual Verification to True after Retry Limit Exhausted

assignments.description: Sets the isManualVerificationRequired variable to false and the isEndOrchestration variable to true.
assignments.name: TerminateOrchestrationForRetry
assignments.label: Terminate orchestration

constants.description: Stores the text to be used as the default value to indicate that the clearing house response is received.
constants.name: ClearingHouseResponseReceived

constants.description: Stores the text to be used as the default value to indicate that the clearing house response is timed out.
constants.name: ClearingHouseResponseTimedOut

decisions.description: Determines whether the Status field of the Care Benefit Verify Request record of GetCareBenefitVerifyResponseStatus is Error, Rejected, Verified, or TimedOut.
decisions.name: CheckCareBenefitVerifyResponseStatus
decisions.label: Check Care Benefit Verify Response Status

decisions.description: Determines whether the ResponseName field of the Care Benefit Verify Request record in GetCareBenefitVerificationResponseName is BAD_INPUT or INVALID_CREDENTIALS.
decisions.name: CheckResponse
decisions.label: Check Response

decisions.description: Determines whether the current retry count is less than the maximum allowed retry count.
decisions.name: IsRetryLimitExhausted
decisions.label: Is Retry Limit Exhausted?

decisions.description: Determines whether the Status of the Care Benefit Verify Request record of GetCareBenefitVerifyRequestStatus is Acknowledged.
decisions.name: IsStatusAcknowledged
decisions.label: Is Status Acknowledged?

decisions.description: Determines whether the Status of the Care Benefit Verify Request record of GetCareBenefitVerifyRequestStatusForRetry is Acknowledged.
decisions.name: IsStatusAcknowledgedForRetry
decisions.label: Is Status Acknowledged?

recordLookups.description: Gets the Care Benefit Verify Request record with an ID that matches the careBenefitVerifyRequestId variable. Stores the ID and Status in the Care Benefit Verify Request from GetCareBenefitVerifyRequestStatus record variable.
recordLookups.name: Get_Care_Benefit_Verify_Request_Status
recordLookups.label: Get Care Benefit Verify Request Status

recordLookups.description: Gets the Care Benefit Verify Request record with an ID that matches the careBenefitVerifyRequestId variable. Stores the ID, ResponseName, and the ResponseBody of the result in the Care Benefit Verify Request from GetCareBenefitVerificationResponseName record variable.
recordLookups.name: GetCareBenefitVerificationResponseName
recordLookups.label: Get Care Benefit Verification Response Name

recordLookups.description: Gets the Care Benefit Verify Request record with an ID that matches the careBenefitVerifyRequestId variable. Stores the ID and Status of the result in the Care Benefit Verify Request from GetCareBenefitVerifyRequestStatusForRetry record variable.
recordLookups.name: GetCareBenefitVerifyRequestStatusForRetry
recordLookups.label: Get Care Benefit Verify Request Status

recordLookups.description: Gets the Care Benefit Verify Response record with an ID that matches the careBenefitVerifyRequestId variable. Stores the ID and Status of the result in the Care Benefit Verify Request from GetCareBenefitVerifyResponseStatus record variable.
recordLookups.name: GetCareBenefitVerifyResponseStatus
recordLookups.label: Get Care Benefit Verify Response Status

recordUpdates.description: Updates the Care Benefit Verify Request record with an ID that matches the ID passed into the flow, setting the Status field to Error and the Status Reason field to the message in ErrorInClearingHouseRequestTextTemplate. The Verification Mode field is set to Manual.
recordUpdates.name: UpdateCareBenefitVerifyRequestStatusError
recordUpdates.label: Update Care Benefit Verify Request Status to Error

recordUpdates.description: Updates the Care Benefit Verify Request record with an ID that matches the ID passed into the flow, setting the Status to TimedOut.
recordUpdates.name: UpdateCareBenefitVerifyRequestStatustoTimedOut
recordUpdates.label: Update Care Benefit Verify Request Status to TimedOut

recordUpdates.description: Updates the Care Benefit Verify Request record with an ID that matches the ID passed into the flow, setting the Verification Mode field is set to Manual.
recordUpdates.name: UpdateCareBenefitVerifyRequestVerificationModetoManual
recordUpdates.label: Update Care Benefit Verify Request Verification Mode to Manual

textTemplates.description: Stores the body of the text template, notifying the running user that an error has occurred while sending a request to the clearinghouse.
textTemplates.name: ClearingHouseRequestSendErrorTextTemplate
textTemplates.text: Failed::Error while sending request to Clearing House

textTemplates.name: ClearingHouseResponseTimedoutTextTemplate
textTemplates.text: Completed::Electronic verification failed. Initiating manual verification request.

textTemplates.description: Stores the body of the text template for the benefit verification Completed message.
textTemplates.name: CompletedTextTemplate

textTemplates.description: Stores the body of the text template for an error in the clearinghouse request.
textTemplates.name: ErrorInClearingHouseRequestTextTemplate
textTemplates.text: Initiate eBV request to Clearing House Failed.

textTemplates.description: Stores the body of the text template for the benefit verification failed message.
textTemplates.name: FailedTextTemplate
InitiateManualVerificationTextTemplate
textTemplates.text: Completed::Electronic verification failed. Initiating manual verification.

textTemplates.description: Stores the body of the text template for the benefit verification in-progress message.
textTemplates.name: InProgressTextTemplate

textTemplates.description: Stores the body of the text template for the electronic benefit verification retry message.
textTemplates.name: RetryBenefitVerificationTextTemplate
textTemplates.text: Waiting::Fix the errors, and retry electronic verification.

variables.description: Stores the AsyncRequestResponseEvent record that is returned from the platform event when the Request GUID matches the guidForMulesoft variable for the current flow.
variables.name: AsynchronousResponse

variables.description: Stores Care Benefit Verify Request input record
variables.name: careBenefitVerifyRequest

variables.description: Stores the ID of the Care Benefit Verify Request record that is passed into the flow.
variables.name: careBenefitVerifyRequestId

variables.description: Stores the current count of retry attempts for sending the request to MuleSoft.
variables.name: CurRetryCount

variables.description: Stores the ID of the related object for the flow orchestrator instance.
variables.name: flowOrchestratorInstanceRelatedObjectId

variables.description: Stores the unique GUID for the request that is sent to MuleSoft.
variables.name: guidForMulesoft

variables.description: Stores the maximum number of retry attempts for sending the request to MuleSoft.
variables.name: MaxRetryCount

variables.description: Stores the step number of the benefit verification process that is passed into the flow.
variables.name: stepNumber

waits.description: Pauses the flow until an asynchronous request response event is received from the Clearing House, where the event’s Request GUID matches the guidForMulesoft variable. If there's no response, the flow times out one hour after the flow run starts. To change the timeout period, update the Time Offset and Time Offset Unit fields in the Timeout configuration. The default path ends the flow.
waits.name: WaitforClearinghouseAcknowledgment
waits.label: Wait for Clearinghouse Acknowledgment

waits.description: Pauses the flow until a platform event is received where the Record Identifier matches careBenefitVerifyRequestId, the Status matches either the value of ClearingHouseResponseReceived or ClearingHouseResponseTimedOut constant variables, or a time limit of 4 hours is exceeded. If no event is received or the time limit is exceeded, the flow proceeds to GetCareBenefitVerifyRequestStatus.
waits.name: WaitforClearinghouseResponse
waits.label: Wait for Clearinghouse Response

waits.description: Pauses the flow until a platform event is received where the RecordIdentifier matches careBenefitVerifyRequestId and the Status is ElectronicVerificationRetried. If no event is received, the flow proceeds after 10 days and terminates the orchestration.
waits.name: WaitForPspRepToRetry
waits.label: Wait for PSP Rep to Retry
